news.t: Industrial Stocks May Be Getting in the Groove
Industrials ETFs rally on sector broadening, airline stimulus hopes
3 Charts That Suggest Traders Are Betting on Industrials

holdings.infoBox: VIS is an equity ETF with a total of 403 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 5.76%, GE Aerospace at 4.78%, GE Vernova at 3.69%, RTX Corporation at 3.42%, and The Boeing Company at 2.44%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Industrials ETF (VIS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI US IMI 25/50 Industrials indexThe fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US industrial stocks. VIS was launched on Sep 23, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Industrial Stocks May Be Getting in the Groove
data.text: It's actually been a good year for industrial stocks, and 2022 could be better. Here's what a closer look at the Vanguard Industrial ETF shows.

data.title: Industrials ETFs rally on sector broadening, airline stimulus hopes
data.text: Exchange-traded funds focused on the industrial sector outperformed Wednesday as investors scooped up stocks that haven't participated in the year-long tech and consumer-led rally. The Industrial Sele...

data.title: 3 Charts That Suggest Traders Are Betting on Industrials
data.text: While industrials stocks are often overlooked by investors, the charts suggest that this group is poised for additional gains.
